---
title: "Speedback"
author: "Adrian Barnett"
date: "2025-06-05"
draft: false
slug: speedback
tags:
- writing
subtitle: ''
description: ''
showtoc: false
image: /img/bridge_3.jpg
---

Warning: this blog may sound a lot like bragging. 

Speedback is also used to combine speed-dating and feedback. I think my use is better.

bottleneck
